THE PROGRAM FOCUSES ON BRIDGING THE GAP BETWEEN CLASSROOM LEARNING AND REAL-WORLD EXPECTATIONS BY COMBINING PROFESSIONAL SKILL DEVELOPMENT WITH INSIGHTS INTO TECHNOLOGY-DRIVEN OPPORTUNITIES. Name: SURESHKUMAR M

A key highlight of the workshop is its emphasis on technology commercialization, where participants will learn how innovative ideas, projects, and research outcomes can be converted into viable business models. Name: DINESH D
Event Name: TWO DAYS WORKSHOP ON MATERIAL CHARACTERIZATION
Event Description: IN THE REALM OF MATERIAL SCIENCE, THE CHARACTERIZATION OF MATERIALS IS ESSENTIAL FOR UNDERSTANDING THEIR PROPERTIES AND BEHAVIOR. THIS STUDY EMPLOYS ADVANCED TECHNIQUES SUCH AS FIELD EMISSION SCANNING ELECTRON MICROSCOPY (FESEM), FOURIER TRANSFORM INFRARED SPECTROSCOPY (FTIR), AND ULTRAVIOLET (UV) SPECTROSCOPY TO DELVE INTO THE INTRICATE DETAILS OF THE MATERIALS UNDER INVESTIGATION. FESEM PROVIDES HIGH-RESOLUTION IMAGING, ALLOWING FOR THE EXAMINATION OF SURFACE MORPHOLOGY AND ELEMENTAL COMPOSITION. FTIR SPECTROSCOPY IS EMPLOYED TO ANALYZE THE CHEMICAL BONDS PRESENT IN THE MATERIAL, PROVIDING INSIGHTS INTO ITS MOLECULAR STRUCTURE. UV SPECTROSCOPY, ON THE OTHER HAND, OFFERS VALUABLE INFORMATION ABOUT THE ELECTRONIC TRANSITIONS WITHIN THE MATERIAL. BY INTEGRATING THESE TECHNIQUES, A COMPREHENSIVE ANALYSIS OF THE MATERIAL'S PHYSICAL, CHEMICAL, AND ELECTRONIC PROPERTIES IS ACHIEVED, PAVING THE WAY FOR A DEEPER UNDERSTANDING OF ITS CHARACTERISTICS AND POTENTIAL APPLICATIONS.

Name: SUBRATA DAS
Event Name: GUEST LECTURE ON PRDUCT DEVELOPMENT FROM SILK MATERIAL
Event Description: EVENT DESCRIPTION: EVENT WAS ORGANISED TO GIVE KNOWLEDGE TO THE STUDENT ON INNOVATIVE PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT FROM SILK. MR. SHILLIN SANGAPPA, THE RESOURCE PERSON FROM CENTRAL SILK BOARD, BANGALORE INFORMED TO THE STUDENTS THAT CONSUMER APPAREL ITEMS MADE FROM SILK INCLUDE SCARVES, SHIRTS, BLOUSES, AND EVENINGWEAR. DUE TO ITS LIGHTWEIGHT AND SOFT ATTRIBUTES, SILK IS ALSO A FAVORITE MATERIAL FOR LINGERIE AND UNDERWEAR FOR MEN. IN THE HOME, SILK MIGHT BE USED TO MAKE DECORATIVE PILLOWS, CURTAINS, OR WALL HANGINGS. CLOTHING: SILK IS COMMONLY USED IN THE MANUFACTURE OF LUXURY AND HIGH-END GARMENTS SUCH AS DRESSES, BLOUSES, SHIRTS, SCARVES, TIES AND LINGERIE. ITS LIGHTNESS AND BREATHABILITY MAKE IT IDEAL FOR WARM WEATHER GARMENTS.
Guest1 Organization Details: CSTRI IS THE ONLY RESEARCH INSTITUTE IN THE COUNTRY DEDICATED TO THE RESEARCH & DEVELOPMENTAL ACTIVITIES RELATED TO SILK TECHNOLOGY. CSTRI WAS ESTABLISHED IN THE YEAR 1983 BY THE CENTRAL SILK BOARD, MINISTRY OF TEXTILES, GOVT. OF INDIA. TILL THEN, SILK TECHNOLOGY HAD ONLY THE STATUS OF A DIVISION IN THE SERICULTURAL RESEARCH INSTITUTES IN THE COUNTRY. APPRECIATING THE NEED FOR A GREATER THRUST ON THE DEMAND SIDE OF THE SILK INDUSTRY, THE ESTABLISHMENT OF CSTRI WAS THE FIRST STEP IN THE RIGHT DIRECTION. TODAY, CSTRI IS RECOGNISED AS ONE OF THE TEXTILE RESEARCH ASSOCIATIONS IN THE COUNTRY BY THE GOVERNMENT OF INDIA.

Name: MERCY P
Event Name: ROLE OF ELECTRONICS IN ELECTRICAL FIELD
Event Description: THE ROLE OF ELECTRONICS IN ELECTRICAL FIELD  IS THAT THE ELECTRONICS IS A SCIENTIFIC AND ENGINEERING DISCIPLINE THAT STUDIES AND APPLIES THE PRINCIPLES OF PHYSICS TO DESIGN, CREATE, AND OPERATE DEVICES THAT MANIPULATE ELECTRONS AND OTHER ELECTRICALLY CHARGED PARTICLES. ELECTRONICS IS A SUBFIELD OF ELECTRICAL ENGINEERING, BUT IT DIFFERS FROM IT IN THAT IT FOCUSES ON USING ACTIVE DEVICES SUCH AS TRANSISTORS, DIODES, AND INTEGRATED CIRCUITS TO CONTROL AND AMPLIFY THE FLOW OF ELECTRIC CURRENT AND TO CONVERT IT FROM ONE FORM TO ANOTHER, SUCH AS FROM ALTERNATING CURRENT (AC) TO DIRECT CURRENT (DC) OR FROM ANALOG SIGNALS TO DIGITAL SIGNALS.

Name: TAMILSELVI S
Event Name: BIT HACK' 23 - WILD CARD ROUND
Event Description: BIT SPECIAL LABS HOSTED AN EXCLUSIVE EVENT BIT HACK 23, AN INTERNAL HACKATHON TO STUDENTS OF ALL YEARS. THIS THRILLING COMPETITION COVERED THREE EXCITING DOMAINS: SOFTWARE, HARDWARE, AND INNOVATION. THE WILDCARD PRELIMINARY ROUND FOR THE BIT HACK 23 WAS HELD ON SEPTEMBER 09, 2023 WITH A TOTAL PARTICIPATION OF 224 TEAMS IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED DOMAINS. THE SOFTWARE STREAM OF THE EVENT FEATURED IN TEN DIVERSE DOMAINS, THAT INCLUDES FULL STACK DEVELOPMENT, MACHINE LEARNING AND DEEP LEARNING, AUGMENTED REALITY AND VIRTUAL REALITY, BLOCKCHAIN, NATURAL LANGUAGE PROCESSING, CLOUD COMPUTING, QT, CYBER SECURITY, WEB DEVELOPMENT AND INNOVATION - SOFTWARE SOLUTIONS. ON THE OTHER HAND, THE HARDWARE STREAM OFFERED SIX DOMAINS, SUCH AS AUTOMATION, INTERNET OF THINGS, ELECTRONICS, MECHANICAL ENGINEERING, BIOTECHNOLOGY AND FOOD TECHNOLOGY, FASHION TECHNOLOGY AND TEXTILE TECHNOLOGY AND SPECIAL FOCUS ON INNOVATION - HARDWARE SOLUTIONS. Name: DANIEL RAJ A
Event Name: FIRST AID SAFETY
Event Description: TUESDAY,18TH JULY 2023: BIT CAMPUS HOSTED A HIGHLY INFORMATIVE AND ESSENTIAL EVENT ON FIRST AID SAFETY, ORGANIZED BY THE YOUTH RED CROSS (YRC-BIT). THE EVENT SAW AN ENTHUSIASTIC TURNOUT, WITH 86 STUDENTS EAGERLY PARTICIPATING IN THE TRAINING SESSION. THE PROGRAM WAS EFFECTIVELY FACILITATED BY THE DEDICATED FACULTY CO-ORDINATOR, MR. A. DANIEL RAJ, AP-III/ECE MR. BENJAMIN, AN EXPERIENCED FIRST AID TRAINEE FROM THE ESTEEMED INDIAN RED CROSS, CONDUCTED THE TRAINING, ENSURING THAT THE STUDENTS RECEIVED COMPREHENSIVE AND PRACTICAL KNOWLEDGE. THE MAIN FOCUS OF THE TRAINING WAS TO EQUIP THE PARTICIPANTS WITH LIFE-SAVING SKILLS, PARTICULARLY FOCUSING ON HEART PATIENTS. THE STUDENTS WERE TAUGHT THE PROPER PROCEDURES OF CARDIO-PULMONARY RESUSCITATION (CPR), A VITAL TECHNIQUE THAT CAN SIGNIFICANTLY INCREASE THE CHANCES OF SURVIVAL FOR SOMEONE EXPERIENCING CARDIAC ARREST. THE TRAINING EMPHASIZED HOW TO ADMINISTER CPR EFFECTIVELY UNTIL PROFESSIONAL MEDICAL HELP, SUCH AS AN AMBULANCE, ARRIVES. FURTHERMORE, THE EVENT COVERED TECHNIQUES FOR LIFTING AND SAFELY TRANSPORTING PATIENTS TO AN AMBULANCE, MINIMIZING THE RISK OF ADDITIONAL INJURIES DURING THE PROCESS. STUDENTS ACTIVELY PARTICIPATED IN HANDS-ON DEMONSTRATIONS, PRACTICING THE CORRECT TECHNIQUES UNDER EXPERT GUIDANCE

Name: DINESH D
Event Name: ROBOTICS AND AUTOMATION IN INDUSTRY 4.0
Event Description: ROBOTICS IN PROCESS AUTOMATION IS A NEW AGE IT SOLUTION WHICH IS USED TO AUTOMATION BUSINESS PROCESSES WHICH TYPICALLY REQUIRED HUMAN INTERVENTION. ROBOTICS IS A CRUCIAL DRIVING FORCE IN TODAY'S BUSINESS, AS IT CAN BE UTILIZED TO BOOST PRODUCTIVITY WHILE MAINTAINING HIGH PRECISION, AND IT CAN QUICKLY ADAPT TO ANY EXISTING SYSTEM. EVERY INDUSTRY NOWADAYS IS ATTEMPTING TO INTEGRATE ROBOTS INTO THEIR FACILITY AS A FULLY AUTOMATED SYSTEM. THE OBJECTIVE OF THE FDP IS TO BRING ACADEMICIANS, RESEARCH SCHOLARS, AND INDUSTRY EXPERTS OF MATCHING INTERESTS ON A COMMON PLATFORM TO NETWORK AND HAVE SCIENTIFIC DISCUSSIONS ON THE LATEST DEVELOPMENTS IN THE FIELDS OF “ROBOTICS” AND ITS UP-TO-DATE APPLICATION IN MECHANICAL AND PRODUCTION INDUSTRIES. IN ADDITION, THE GOAL OF THIS PROGRAM IS TO CREATE A 6-AXIS ROBOT ARM PROTOTYPE. THE SESSION IS DESIGNED TO ENRICH THE KNOWLEDGE ON RECENT DEVELOPMENTS IN THE ADVANCED TOPICS (HUMAN ROBOT INTERACTION, AUGMENTED REALITY FOR INDUSTRIAL ROBOTS, ROBOTIC CELL DESIGN AND OPTIMIZATION, SENSORS FUSION, INTELLIGENT AND AUTONOMOUS ROBOTS FOR MANUFACTURING APPLICATIONS, SAFETY AND MAINTENANCE GUIDELINES) BYE EMINENT EXPERTS IN ROBOTICS DOMAIN.

Name: DINESH D
Event Name: SMART NANOMATERIALS FOR MEDICAL AND ENERGY APPLICATIONS TOWARDS INDUSTRY
Event Description: THERE HAS BEEN A SPECTACULAR ADVANCE IN NANOTECHNOLOGY, WHICH HAS USHERED NUMEROUS APPLICATIONS IN DIVERSE AREAS, SUCH AS ENERGY, ENVIRONMENT, AGRICULTURE, MEDICINE, SENSORS, ETC. NANOTECHNOLOGY IS FOUND ELSEWHERE TODAY IN PRODUCTS RANGING FROM NANOMETRE-THICK FILMS ON SELF-CLEANING WINDOWS TO POWER GENERATORS. THESE PROFOUNDLY DIFFERENT PROPERTIES ARE DUE TO THE INCREASED SURFACE AREA COMPARED TO VOLUME AS PARTICLES GET SMALLER. TINY, SUPER-STRONG ROLLS OF CARBON ATOMS KNOWN AS CARBON NANOTUBES WERE CREATED IN 1991. THESE ARE SIX TIMES LIGHTER YET 100 TIMES STRONGER THAN STEEL. THOSE NANOTUBES HAVE BEEN MADE INTO FIBERS, LONG THREADS, AND FABRICS AND USED TO CREATE RIGID PLASTICS, COMPUTER CHIPS, TOXIC GAS DETECTORS, AND NUMEROUS OTHER NOVEL MATERIALS. THE FUTURE MAY EVEN SEE THE UNIQUE PROPERTIES OF NANOTUBES HARNESSED TO BUILD A SPACE ELEVATOR. CURRENTLY, YOU CAN POWER YOUR ELECTRONICS BY MOVING AROUND USING NANOTECHNOLOGY.

Name: DINESH D
Event Name: WORKSHOP ON FIELD EMISSION SCANNING ELECTRON MICROSCOPY
Event Description: FE-SEM PROVIDES ULTRA-HIGH RESOLUTION IMAGING AT LOW ACCELERATING VOLTAGES AND SMALL WORKING DISTANCES. FESEM IS A MICROSCOPE THAT PROVIDES TOPOGRAPHIC DETAILS OF THE SURFACE OR ENTIRE OR FRACTIONED OBJECTS. THE IMAGING OF THE SAMPLE  PROVIDES RESOLUTION OF THE IMAGES IS AS LOW AS 1.6 NM AT 1 KV AND 1 NM AT 15 KV, ALLOWING EXAMINATION OF THE TOP SURFACE OF VARIOUS SAMPLES IN THE WIDE RANGE OF APPLICATIONS SUCH AS MINERALOGY, CERAMICS, POLYMER, METALLURGY, ELECTRONIC DEVICES, CHEMISTRY, PHYSICS, LIFE SCIENCES AND ENGINEERING. THIS SYSTEM IS EQUIPPED WITH SEVERAL DETECTORS TO DETECT VARIOUS SIGNALS SUCH AS SECONDARY ELECTRONS (INLENS) DETECTOR, SE2 (EVERHART-THORNLY) DETECTOR FOR TOPOGRAPHIC INFORMATION AND BACK-SCATTERED ELECTRONS (BSE) DETECTOR FOR MATERIALS COMPOSITION CONTRAST. ENERGY DISPERSIVE X-RAY SPECTROSCOPY (EDS) WITH DETECTOR ENERGY RESOLUTION OF < 129 EV. THE MAIN AIM OF THE WORKSHOP IS TO PROVIDE BASIC KNOWLEDGE ABOUT THE PRINCIPLE AND WORKING OF FESEM WITH STEM DETECTOR, DETAILS ABOUT ELEMENTAL ANALYSIS USING ENERGY DISPERSIVE X-RAY SPECTROSCOPY (EDS) AND ITS APPLICATIONS FOR MATERIALS CHARACTERIZATION IN VARIOUS FIELDS OF MATERIAL SCIENCE.

Name: DINESH D
Event Name: WEBINAR ON SUSTAINABLE INNOVATION NANOTECHNOLOGY FOR DIFFERENT APPLICATION
Event Description: THERE HAS BEEN A SPECTACULAR ADVANCE IN NANOTECHNOLOGY, WHICH HAS USHERED NUMEROUS APPLICATIONS IN DIVERSE AREAS, SUCH AS ENERGY, ENVIRONMENT, AGRICULTURE, MEDICINE, SENSORS, ETC. NANOTECHNOLOGY IS FOUND ELSEWHERE TODAY IN PRODUCTS RANGING FROM NANOMETRE-THICK FILMS ON SELF-CLEANING WINDOWS TO POWER GENERATORS. THESE PROFOUNDLY DIFFERENT PROPERTIES ARE DUE TO THE INCREASED SURFACE AREA COMPARED TO VOLUME AS PARTICLES GET SMALLER. TINY, SUPER-STRONG ROLLS OF CARBON ATOMS KNOWN AS CARBON NANOTUBES WERE CREATED IN 1991. THESE ARE SIX TIMES LIGHTER YET 100 TIMES STRONGER THAN STEEL. THOSE NANOTUBES HAVE BEEN MADE INTO FIBERS, LONG THREADS, AND FABRICS AND USED TO CREATE RIGID PLASTICS, COMPUTER CHIPS, TOXIC GAS DETECTORS, AND NUMEROUS OTHER NOVEL MATERIALS. THE FUTURE MAY EVEN SEE THE UNIQUE PROPERTIES OF NANOTUBES HARNESSED TO BUILD A SPACE ELEVATOR. CURRENTLY, YOU CAN POWER YOUR ELECTRONICS BY MOVING AROUND USING NANOTECHNOLOGY.
